custom_strike.Sporting Outcome: Records a goal in every knockout stage match including the Round of 32, Round of 16, Quarterfinals, Semifinals, and Final

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs or the tournament ends.
markets.no_sub_title: Any player to score a goal in every knockout stage match
markets.rules_primary: If any individual player records a goal in every knockout stage match including the Round of 32, Round of 16, Quarterfinals, Semifinals, and Final in the 2026 Men's FIFA World Cup, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this market, 'every knockout stage match' refers to all rounds of the knockout stage (excluding the third-place match). The market resolves to Yes if any individual player scores at least one goal in the Round of 32, Round of 16, Quarterfinals, Semifinals, and the Final of the 2026 Men's FIFA World Cup. Therefore, any players on teams that do not reach the Final are not eligible to score a goal in every knockout stage match. Note: Only goals recorded during regulation, stoppage, or extra time count towards this market. Any goals recorded during a penalty shootout do not count. Own goals do not count for purposes of this market.

This market and these products have not been endorsed by FIFA. Any references to "FIFA", the "FIFA World Cup," or any other associated marks are descriptive only, and do not indicate an endorsement of this product or any affiliation between FIFA and Kalshi.
markets.title: Will any player score a goal in every knockout stage match in the 2026 Men's FIFA World Cup?
markets.yes_sub_title: Any player to score a goal in every knockout stage match

title: World Cup: Any Player to Score a Goal in Every Knockout Stage Match
